text:
It’s a tranquil evening. The sun dips below the horizon, casting a warm glow over the quiet town. Kids are laughing as they play outside, the hum of distant traffic blending into the evening serenity.

There's a young girl named Ella who lives just blocks from where she plays. She loves going outdoors, exploring the world around her, and tonight, she climbs to the top of the hill which sits adjacent to her neighborhood. As she takes her first cautious steps upward, she gazes at the sky, dreaming of stars.

As she winds her way up, the shadows of the trees on the path lengthening, she pauses to collect her thoughts. She imagines storytelling one day, perhaps of her adventures here. She hears the crickets begin their evening chorus and feels a soft breeze, a companion on her ascent.

Upon reaching the summit, Ella finds a small, round mirror propped against a smooth rock. It reflects the soft colors of a twilight sky. She smiles at her own
